pageContext.name: Doze (Ver. 1)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Manas SUM are proud to present the Doze (Ver. 1) Statue. This resin figure is beautifully crafted and stands 16.2 inches tall. It features glow-in-the-dark features to make it stand out and catch the eye at any time of day.  A joint collaboration between MANAS S+U+M and sculptor Yuuki Morita (who has worked with creative studios such as AMD, Legendary Pictures and GAMEFREAK) the Doze Statue is a striking and beautifully surreal limited-edition collector's item that would be a great addition, or a great start, to any art collection.
